responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?
Hey! I'm the OpenMuni assistant. Ask me anything about local projects.
Goodbye! Have a great day!
See you later! Feel free to ask me anything anytime.
Bye! Come back soon.
You're welcome!
Happy to help!
My pleasure.
OpenMuni is a platform for transparency in local government projects. You can view proposed and ongoing projects in your municipality.

patterns: Can I see the list of projects?
responses: You can view all public projects on the 'Projects' page.
To see the latest projects, please visit the 'Projects' section of this website.

patterns: What is the transparency page for?
responses: You can find the transparency seal and related information on the 'Transparency' page.
The 'Transparency' page provides information about the municipality's commitment to openness and accountability.
You can log in by clicking the 'Login' button on the top right of the page.
The login page is accessible from the main menu.

patterns: how much is the budget for
how much money was spent on
what is the start date for
when is the target completion for
tell me the deadline of the
tell me the current status for
what phase is the project in
how do i propose a project
where can i submit a proposal
can i suggest a new project
how to request a road repair
i want to submit a project idea
responses: To propose a project, you need to be logged into an official account. Once logged in, navigate to your Dashboard and fill out the 'Propose New Project' form with the title, budget, and location details.

patterns: how do i get an account
who gets to be an admin
responses: Currently, accounts are restricted to Sub-Admins and Super Admins. If you are a local official and need access, please contact the Super Admin to have your account generated.

patterns: how do i contact the mayor
who do i call for help
i want to report a bug on the website
responses: For technical issues with the OpenMuni portal or to reach the municipal office, please visit the 'About' page or contact your local barangay hall directly during working hours.

patterns: how many barangays are in the system
responses: OpenMuni tracks projects across all registered barangays in the municipality. You can view the specific barangay for each project on the 'Public Projects' page!
